description: Rollout gate thresholds for promoting new bypass tactics from lab diagnostics to production defaults.

gates.reason: A new tactic needs enough breadth and winner reliability across the acceptance corpus.
Production defaults should not carry a large steady-state latency penalty.
A tactic that repeatedly churns routes or tunnel recovery is not production-safe.

gates.threshold: recommended winner stays non-root and non-downgraded
gates.reason: High-visibility or degraded emitters stay in lab until a safer default exists.
A production winner should not depend on runtime capabilities that are absent on the measured Android path.
